summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance batch improvements (iteration 10). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. Fixed header uses fixed positioning, Dashboard shows monthly balance with global in small text, Annual overview table renders correctly, Reports page has stacked distribution chart, Budget comments appear as tooltips, Favicon files exist.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Backend BudgetCreate model correctly includes month, comment, comment_recurring fields
Backend upsert_budget endpoint correctly handles month-specific budgets with fallback to current month
Backend edit_savings_goal and edit_debt endpoints correctly update current_amount with proper validation
Backend reports endpoint returns annual_overview (12 months) and stacked_chart arrays with correct structure
Frontend Layout.jsx header uses 'fixed' positioning (line 101) for Safari/Mac compatibility
Frontend Dashboard.jsx monthly-balance-card shows 'Disponible del mes' with monthly balance and 'Global:' in small text
Frontend Dashboard.jsx annual-overview-table renders 'Gasto Real por Mes' with all 12 months
Frontend Reports.jsx stacked-chart-card renders stacked bar chart with income_pct, expenses_pct, savings_pct, debts_pct
Frontend public/index.html has favicon.svg and favicon.png links
Favicon files exist at /app/frontend/public/favicon.svg and favicon.png
seed_data_creation: Test users, sessions, categories, transactions, and budgets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested batch improvements: 1) Fixed header positioning verified, 2) Monthly balance card with global in small text verified, 3) Budget month field and comparison endpoint with month filter verified, 4) Edit savings/debts current_amount endpoints verified, 5) Reports annual_overview and stacked_chart arrays verified, 6) Favicon files verified. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend renders all new features properly.

backend_budget_with_month.details: Creates month-specific budget with month field (YYYY-MM format). Defaults to current month if not provided.

backend_budget_comparison_month_filter.details: Returns month-specific budgets with comment and comment_recurring fields.

backend_edit_savings_goal.details: Updates current_amount. Returns 400 if current_amount missing, 404 if goal not found.

backend_edit_debt.details: Updates current_amount. Returns 400 if current_amount missing, 404 if debt not found.

backend_reports_annual_overview.details: Returns annual_overview array with 12 objects (month, label, income, expenses, savings, debts, net).

backend_reports_stacked_chart.details: Returns stacked_chart array with 12 objects (label, month, income_pct, expenses_pct, savings_pct, debts_pct).

frontend_fixed_header.details: Header uses 'fixed' positioning (not sticky) for Safari/Mac compatibility.

frontend_monthly_balance_card.details: Shows 'Disponible del mes' with monthly balance and 'Global:' in small text.

frontend_annual_overview_table.details: Renders 'Gasto Real por Mes' table with all 12 months showing Ingresos, Gastos, Ahorro, Deudas, Neto.

frontend_stacked_distribution_chart.details: Renders stacked bar chart 'Distribucion de Gasto x Mes' with percentage distribution.

frontend_budget_comments_tooltip.details: Budget comments appear as small dot indicator next to category name with tooltip on hover.

frontend_favicon.details: Favicon links present in index.html, files exist on disk.
